question: Which tools does a carpenter use and what are their stated purposes?

answers.ground_truth: A carpenter uses a hammer to drive nails and a saw to cut wood.
answers.original: The carpenter uses a hammer to drive nails and a saw to cut wood.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

entities.name: Carpenter
entities.description: The carpenter uses tools like a hammer and a saw to work with nails and wood.

entities.name: Hammer
entities.description: The hammer is a tool used by the carpenter to drive nails.

entities.name: Saw
entities.description: The saw is a tool used by the carpenter to cut wood.

relations.description: The carpenter uses a hammer to drive nails.
The carpenter uses a saw to cut wood.
